notes: Fail diff hardcodes STALENESS_THRESHOLD_DAYS = 14 with a comment that treats 14 days as THE operational definition of staleness — shipped-premise framing. Spec mentions staleness as one of four metrics without prescribing a threshold. Pass diff makes it project-tunable via CLI flag + config file, explicitly noting the spec proposes but doesn't fix the value. PM lens must notice the hardcoded-as-definitional framing without a Frame Check entry pointing at it.
